prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021年至2025年，山东大学在重庆市医学类最低录取位次分别为4471名（计划9人）、5422名（计划7人）、9265名（计划10人）、13384名（计划13人）、13949名（计划13人） 。整体呈逐年下降趋势（位次数字增大），其中2023年位次大幅下滑至9265名，2024年进一步降至13384名，2025年降幅明显收窄至仅565名。2026年医学类总计划从13人扩至15人 （+15.4%），其中护理学从6人扩至8人，新增口腔医学（五年制）2人，药学类退出招生。扩招对位次有继续下拉作用，但近年降幅趋缓表明位次可能接近阶段性均衡。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 山东大学是教育部直属全国重点大学，国家985工程、211工程重点建设高校，入选国家双一流建设高校，综合实力位居全国前列。其医学学科历史悠久，齐鲁医学品牌在国内外 享有较高声誉，临床医学等专业长期保持强劲的报考吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 医学类专业在全国范围内持续保持高报考热度，临床医学（5+3一体化、五年制）、口腔医学等核心专业竞争激烈。山东大学位于山东省济南市，虽非一线城市，但作为传统医学 强校，对西南地区考生仍具较强吸引力。重庆市医学类招生规模适中，2026年扩招后总计划15人，护理学扩招幅度较大，有利于位次偏后的考生进入。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合M3供需弹性模型计算及近年位次趋势分析，预测2026年山东大学在重庆市医学类最低录取位次约为15286名，对应波动区间为14827至15745名。扩招因素使位次继续小幅后移 ，但降幅较前两年明显收窄，整体趋于稳定。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum admission rankings for Medicine at Shandong University in Chongqing were 4471 (plan 9), 5422 (plan 7), 9265 (plan 10), 13384 (plan 13), and 13949 (plan 13) respectively. The overall trend shows a year-on-year decline (ranking numbers increase), with a significant drop to 9265 in 2023, further decreasing to 13384 in 2024, and a notably narrowed decline of only 565 in 2025. In 2026, the total plan for Medicine expands from 13 to 15 (+15.4%), with Nursing expanding from 6 to 8, adding Stomatology (five-year program) 2, and Pharmacy exiting enrollment. The expansion continues to pull rankings downward, but the recent slowdown in decline suggests rankings may be approaching a phase equilibrium.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university under the national 985 Project and 211 Project, and selected as a national Double First-Class construction university, with comprehensive strength ranking among the top in the country. Its medical disciplines have a long history, the Qilu Medicine brand enjoys a high reputation both domestically and internationally, and majors such as Clinical Medicine maintain strong appeal for applicants.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Medical majors continue to maintain high application popularity nationwide, with core majors such as Clinical Medicine (5+3 integrated program, five-year program) and Stomatology being highly competitive. Shandong University is located in Jinan, Shandong Province, which, although not a first-tier city, as a traditional strong medical school, still has strong appeal to candidates from the southwestern region. The enrollment scale for Medicine in Chongqing is moderate, with a total plan of 15 after expansion in 2026, and a larger expansion in Nursing, which is beneficial for candidates with lower rankings to gain admission.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the comprehensive M3 supply-demand elasticity model calculation and analysis of recent ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Medicine at Shandong University in Chongqing in 2026 is approximately 15286, with a corresponding fluctuation range of 14827 to 15745. The expansion factor continues to push rankings slightly backward, but the decline is significantly narrower compared to the previous two years, showing an overall trend toward stabilization.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Clinical Medicine (Qilu Medical Hall Innovation Experimental Class)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Stomatology (Five-Year Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: With rankings within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety.
